title: Senior Doctor - Sanofi India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Sanofi India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India:
Sanofi India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India!
